programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar's got a steal of a deal in Port Richey. But after they pull up to this 90s Era Time capsule, they discover that vandals, roaches, and water damage have had their way with the interior.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off-trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive. They have to fight both man and nature.

programme.title: My Child Has my Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today's theme is "Hotel Stay vs. Countryside Stay: The Accommodation Showdown!" For those who are passionate about interior design, places encountered during travels can provide a wealth of inspiration.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s the classic MasterChef team-relay challenge, where four teams must compete to create a dish that uses potatoes in at least two ways. The winning team will secure immunity from the next elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Twelve MasterChef contestants are met by a bust of judge Jean-Christophe Novelli, made entirely of butter. Fighting for their place in the competition, they must create a dish celebrating butter.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s Viral Week and contestants must cook a dish worthy of a Nonna’s table, under the watchful eyes of viral sensations Sooshi Mango. The four best dishes will win a shot at immunity.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael demonstrates how easy it is to make flavourful Manila clams that can serve several people. She also cooks up a side dish of warm zucchini and corn salad with charred ciabatta bread.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Your table is ready and it's time to get served in the most unusual ways. Join host Michael Yo's journey to Thailand for crispy flying fried chicken, then dinner is served with a side of sassy lip service.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey take on a house that was abandoned by previous flippers! Left with holes in the roof, termite damage and a dilapidated porch this house pushes their skills, and budget, to the limit.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn’t available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy café.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Allie is a free spirit whose polyamorous lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye. Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family with his wife.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: With Gordon Ramsay’s reputation on the line, the top six chefs face the ultimate challenge of taking over the world's largest Hell's Kitchen restaurant.

programme.title: My Child Has my Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up some serious comfort food. With this much flavour, you'd never guess that these robust bull's-eye burgers, topped with sautéed onions and blue-cheese sauce, are actually plant-based.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make a family-favourite recipe of pork cutlets with a fruity and savoury huckleberry sauce, served with potato salad, broccolini and fresh cherry tomatoes.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: In an ideal neighborhood, a ramshackle bungalow with some vandalism and a faulty foundation falls in Derek and Chauncey's laps. A friend of theirs needs help with a flip and only has two weeks.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: The Earth-Cleaning Bros’ second mission: planting trees in the Elsen Tasarkhai desert! Led by self-proclaimed Mongolian expert Shaun, they set out with just one GPS coordinate.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we’ll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We’ll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Contestants face a pressure test for Immunity designed by Dessert Masters winner John Demetrios. As a famous dessert chef, it stands to reason that today’s cook will be a sweet mountain to climb.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s viral week and contestants are vying for immunity once again, challenged to create the ultimate ‘scrollable’ deli meats sandwich followed by a viral dish mash-up.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Hey, Babe! With over 13 million social media followers and three billion views on YouTube, online superstar and chef of over 20 years’ experience Andy Cooks (aka chef Andy Hearnden) sets two challenges.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make an Israeli-inspired, tahini-based yoghurt sauce with harissa, served over charred chicken and family-style pitta.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Derek sees big profit potential when he buys a crumbling old house in a nice neighborhood. Chauncey is skeptical of the half-finished work and the small square footage. Was this all a big mistake?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: When we watch comedians on television, they often seem approachable and friendly. But have you ever wondered what their homes look like and how they’re decorated? Today’s theme is "Comedians' Homes."

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Jon's huge, 25-year-old shoulder-blade bump is ruining his family beach days and risking his health. April wants the wedding of her dreams but feels hideous in gowns due to her bumpy underarm "threast".

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The remaining five home cooks take on two rounds of challenges that determine who will move on to the Finals.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Theresa Caputo is back and goes global with her gift of communicating with the dead. With a tour coming up, she decides to do a reading in town before heading off, ends up getting a surprise from clients.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar buys a zombie sight unseen, shocking his business partner Sam, especially having known there may be a sinkhole under the property, threatening the profitability of this flip.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: To fight desertification, the Earth-Cleaning Bros start planting trees, but finding water and the right spot in endless sand is no easy task. Finally, they begin digging with high spirits.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: With rapid societal changes, diverse family structures are emerging beyond traditional norms. In this final episode, we’ll explore "customised family interiors" tailored to various family structures.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: In today's mystery box, each pair of contestants on a bench have been assigned the same key product from the Lee Kum Kee sauce range.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Seven cooks design their own pressure test inspired by seven different Connoisseur ice cream flavours. The cooks of the best two dishes will win immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s a Dough-Fest in the MasterChef garden! And time for the 12 cooking contestants to test their team work in an epic service challenge.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: You only need one skillet to make this stellar sauteed chicken dinner, served with sautéed vegetables and flavoured with heavy cream, dijon mustard and imported beer.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today’s featured homes showcase dramatic transformations. First, we have the "My Modern Journal House," a home that has shed its outdated appearance and embraced a sleek, modern style.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night in Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that will change the young couple's lives forever.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: A mysterious container from Guam has the competition ready for battle. Manic Matt fires a warning shot, but the Israelis aren't backing down. Will this enormous gamble pay off? Or will the container's questionable contents backfire?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 6
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't. And later,vintage slot machines and poker tables send bidding through the roof. The closing price is stratospheric, but what's hidden from sight will be the ultimate payday for one lucky Storage Hunter.

programme.title: Body of Lies
programme.desc: Trust no one. Deceive everyone. When idealistic CIA agent Roger Ferris (Di Caprio -- The Departed, Blood Diamond) is stationed in Jordan after being wounded in Iraq, he dedicates his life to stopping further attacks by Al Qaeda. Following a plan that the British employed successfully against the Nazis, Ferris plants the suspicion among the terrorists that their leaders are collaborating with the Americans. But as the stakes rise and Ferris finds himself in the crosshairs, the plot he starts spirals into an outcome he could never have foreseen.

programme.title: Cat People
programme.desc: Nastassja Kinski stars in this erotic fantasy about a beautiful young woman who discovers love for the first time, only to find that the explosive experience brings tragic consequences.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: After witnessing his parents' death, billionaire Bruce Wayne learns the art of fighting to confront injustice. When he returns to Gotham as Batman, he must stop a secret society that intends to destroy the city.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Julia Roberts and Mel Gibson team up for the first time in this taut thriller of a beautiful Justice Department attorney entangled in a paranoid cab driver's Conspiracy Theory.

programme.title: Cat People
programme.desc: Nastassja Kinski stars in this erotic fantasy about a beautiful young woman who discovers love for the first time, only to find that the explosive experience brings tragic consequences.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

programme.title: From here to Eternity
programme.desc: A brooding loner finds love and turmoil on the eve of the bombing of Pearl Harbor's bombings.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Stop! or My Mom Will Shoot
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Estelle Getty star in this action comedy about a detective whose life is turned upside down when his feisty mother witnesses a murder and becomes his unlikely partner.

programme.title: Asia First

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Jennifer moves into a new apartment after leaving her abusive husband. As she starts life anew, something keeps biting her when she sleeps, leading her to be sleep deprived, paranoid and paralyzed with fear of the unseen.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A violent argument between two men erupts at a busy grocery store. One is shot dead and the other faces a murder charge. With the whole incident caught on CCTV, who will the jury believe was the aggressor?

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: The quiet suburb of Haddon Township is turned upside down when a toddler goes missing. Residents band together to search local streets and help detectives reveal an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: From the perspective of the person being arrested, viewers get a firsthand understanding of what truly happens once the handcuffs are on and the justice system begins its process.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Two teens under interrogation turn on each other; a suspect attempts a shocking escape from police custody; a husband and wife must answer for their deadly secret; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A farmer shares a terrible secret about two missing people—and her pigs; a confrontation over a parking space turns deadly; a missing person case takes a dark turn; and more.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: When Lia was ten, she became intrigued by her mother's many collectibles and started going to antique stores and estate sales with her and is where Lia suspects her hoarding compulsion originates.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: Exotic animal dealer William 'Wild Bill' Zelenski is accused of murdering his girlfriend's 18-year-old son, Ryelee Manente-Powell, after he stole $27,000 worth of venomous and exotic reptiles.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home. Was this a murder/suicide, or could someone else have been responsible?

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Spring Valley's Haitian community is rocked when a civic leader is murdered. It takes police nearly two decades to sift through the rumours and solve a mystery filled with lies and dark secrets.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When an 85-year-old man passes away after years of failing health, authorities quickly rule it a natural death and close the case.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: A local news story reignites a decades-old cold case, leading investigators to question a close-knit circle of friends who they believe are hiding the truth about the disappearance of a 25-year-old man.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A boater goes off the deep end; a naked man causes traffic chaos; a police uniform-swiper gets taken to the cleaners; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man calls 911 on the cops; a woman is accused of stealing a horse and buggy; a man allegedly trespasses and shoots rats in a neighbour's yard; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Travel blogger Carla Stefaniak went to Costa Rica to celebrate her 36th birthday. But when she was to arrive back home to Miami, her awaiting loved ones realised she never got on the plane.

programme.title: Women on Death Row
programme.desc: Shawna Forde was convicted for a 2009 crime that resulted in the violent murders of Raul Flores and his 9-year-old daughter Brisenia. She was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.desc: Learn about whole numbers up to 10 000, ordinal numbers up to 100th, money up to PhP1000, and how to perform addition and subtraction to whole numbers, including money.

programme.desc: Alamin ang kinalalagyan ng mga lalawigan sa rehiyong kinabibilangan ayon sa katangiang heograpikal nito.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer from the heights, VTT rider Kilian Bron teaches tricks to Laurent Guillaume in the heart of the Pyrenees. Together, they explore the mechanisms of dizziness and meet those who live in emptiness on a daily basis.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Les Speciaux
programme.desc: Off to Thailand! Viola and Jan meet Swiss people who have settled in the Land of Smiles. They visit a self-sufficient farm in Sakhton Nakhon and, in Pattaya, a luxury villa with a breathtaking view...

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In Dieppe, David Gallienne meets Anne, who has a passion for gastronomy. Together, they cook live papillotes wrapped in chard leaves and nori seaweed crisps.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In Dieppe, David Gallienne meets Anne, who has a passion for gastronomy. Together, they cook live papillotes wrapped in chard leaves and nori seaweed crisps.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Les Speciaux
programme.desc: Off to Thailand! Viola and Jan meet Swiss people who have settled in the Land of Smiles. They visit a self-sufficient farm in Sakhton Nakhon and, in Pattaya, a luxury villa with a breathtaking view...

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer from the heights, VTT rider Kilian Bron teaches tricks to Laurent Guillaume in the heart of the Pyrenees. Together, they explore the mechanisms of dizziness and meet those who live in emptiness on a daily basis.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre SA Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Angelo Dans LA Foret Mysterieuse
programme.desc: Angelo, 10 years old, finds himself alone at a motorway rest area, forgotten by his parents. Without losing heart, he decides to cut through the forest. He then ventures into a mysterious territory populated by strange beings, threatened by an enemy even worse than the ogre of the region...

programme.title: Spoon
programme.desc: To escape everyday life and fulfill your dream, it's quite simple: you need a ladder and a spoon.

programme.title: LA Mort Du Petit Cheval
programme.desc: Gaby is thrown out by her mother, without even a pair of shoes, but with her cat. She quickly ends up at her sister's place.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leila. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: LA Grande arche
programme.desc: When the austere district of La Defense, a symbol of modernity, becomes the setting for a reflection on architecture, memory, and power.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: Concerned about the sudden disappearance of their colleague Sunlight, the dancers of the famous Parisian cabaret La Nouvelle eve contact the police. Without losing her usual wit, Captain Marleau, assigned to the case, shakes up the nightlife scene.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Ness Et Rayan
programme.desc: Ness, an experienced police officer, catches young Rayan in the act as he tries to steal her wallet. Sentenced to perform community service in a police station, Rayan must serve as driver for the woman who arrested him.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: 64' actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events.
